text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Consuming eggs for breakfast influences plasma glucose and ghrelin, while reducing energy intake during the next 24 hours in adult men.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Consuming eggs for breakfast influences plasma glucose and ghrelin, while reducing energy intake during the next 24 hours in adult men.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly reports the observed effects of an egg breakfast on plasma glucose, ghrelin, and subsequent 24‑hour energy intake in adult men.","population":"adult men","intervention":"eggs for breakfast","comparator":"","outcome":"plasma glucose, ghrelin, energy intake during the next 24 hours","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"The effect of an egg breakfast on satiety was studied in children and adolescents in a randomized crossover trial.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The effect of an egg breakfast on satiety in children and adolescents: A randomized crossover trial.","entailment":"The quoted title indicates that a randomized crossover trial examined how an egg breakfast impacts satiety among children and adolescents.","population":"children and adolescents","intervention":"egg breakfast","comparator":"","outcome":"satiety","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"A high‑egg diet was evaluated for its impact on cardiovascular risk factors in people with type 2 diabetes in a 3‑month randomized controlled trial.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The effect of a high‑egg diet on cardiovascular risk factors in people with type 2 diabetes: The Diabetes and Egg (DIABEGG) study‑a 3‑mo randomized controlled trial.","entailment":"The quoted description specifies that a 3‑month RCT examined how a high‑egg diet influences cardiovascular risk factors in individuals with type 2 diabetes.","population":"people with type 2 diabetes","intervention":"high‑egg diet","comparator":"","outcome":"cardiovascular risk factors","timeframe":"3 months","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"Combining egg and fiber affects appetite, glycemic response and food intake in normal‑weight adults in a randomized controlled crossover trial.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The effects of the combination of egg and fiber on appetite, glycemic response and food intake in normal weight adults—A randomized, controlled, crossover trial.","entailment":"The quoted sentence reports that a randomized controlled crossover trial investigated the impact of egg‑plus‑fiber on appetite, glycemic response, and food intake among normal‑weight adults.","population":"normal weight adults","intervention":"combination of egg and fiber","comparator":"","outcome":"appetite, glycemic response, food intake","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"}]}
